search_query: meaning of polished for objects and people
combined_text: polished "polished [ pol -isht]Spell Syllables Synonyms Examples Word Origin See more synonyms on Thesaurus.comadjective1. made smooth and glossy: a figurine of polished mahogany.2. naturally smooth and glossy: polished pebbles on the beach.3. refined, cultured, or elegant: a polished manner.4. flawless; ski
